words.example_sentence: Spring Boot simplifies creating production-ready Spring applications.
words.example_sentence_cn: Spring Boot 简化了可用于生产环境的 Spring 应用开发。

words.example_sentence: Spring Initializr generates a new project with selected dependencies.
words.example_sentence_cn: Spring Initializr 根据所选依赖生成新项目。

words.example_sentence: A starter dependency groups compatible libraries for one capability.
words.example_sentence_cn: Starter 起步依赖为某项能力组合了一组兼容的类库。

words.example_sentence: Auto-configuration creates sensible beans from the classpath and application settings.
words.example_sentence_cn: 自动配置根据类路径和应用设置创建合适的 Bean。

words.example_sentence: Convention over configuration reduces setup by using sensible defaults.
words.example_sentence_cn: 约定优于配置通过合理默认值减少配置工作。
words.code_snippet: // sensible defaults demonstrate convention over configuration

words.example_sentence: An embedded server lets a web application run directly as a Java process.
words.example_sentence_cn: 内嵌服务器让 Web 应用可以直接作为 Java 进程运行。
words.code_snippet: SpringApplication.run(App.class, args);  // starts the embedded server

words.example_sentence: An executable JAR can start a Spring Boot application with java -jar.
words.example_sentence_cn: 可执行 JAR 可以通过 java -jar 启动 Spring Boot 应用。

words.example_sentence: A fat JAR contains the application and its runtime dependencies.
words.example_sentence_cn: Fat JAR 包含应用代码及其运行时依赖。
words.code_snippet: // app.jar contains classes and dependencies  // fat JAR

words.example_sentence: application.properties stores Spring Boot configuration as key-value pairs.
words.example_sentence_cn: application.properties 以键值对形式保存 Spring Boot 配置。

words.example_sentence: application.yml stores hierarchical Spring Boot configuration in YAML.
words.example_sentence_cn: application.yml 使用 YAML 保存层级化 Spring Boot 配置。

words.example_sentence: The @SpringBootApplication annotation enables configuration, component scanning, and auto-configuration.
words.example_sentence_cn: @SpringBootApplication 启用配置、组件扫描和自动配置。

words.example_sentence: The @EnableAutoConfiguration annotation activates Spring Boot auto-configuration.
words.example_sentence_cn: @EnableAutoConfiguration 注解激活 Spring Boot 自动配置。

words.example_sentence: The @Configuration annotation marks a class that declares bean definitions.
words.example_sentence_cn: @Configuration 注解标记用于声明 Bean 定义的配置类。

words.example_sentence: The @Bean annotation registers a method's return value in the Spring container.
words.example_sentence_cn: @Bean 注解把方法返回值注册到 Spring 容器。

words.example_sentence: The @ComponentScan annotation selects packages for component discovery.
words.example_sentence_cn: @ComponentScan 注解选择要扫描组件的包。

words.example_sentence: CommandLineRunner executes code after the application context starts.
words.example_sentence_cn: CommandLineRunner 在应用上下文启动后执行代码。

words.example_sentence: ApplicationRunner runs startup logic with parsed application arguments.
words.example_sentence_cn: ApplicationRunner 使用解析后的应用参数执行启动逻辑。

words.example_sentence: Externalized configuration keeps environment-specific values outside compiled code.
words.example_sentence_cn: 外部化配置把环境相关值放在编译代码之外。

words.example_sentence: A configuration property controls one application setting.
words.example_sentence_cn: 配置属性控制应用中的某项设置。

words.example_sentence: The @Value annotation injects a property or expression into a field or parameter.
words.example_sentence_cn: @Value 注解把配置属性或表达式注入字段或参数。

words.chinese: 类型安全配置绑定注解
words.example_sentence: The @ConfigurationProperties annotation binds related settings to a typed object.
words.example_sentence_cn: @ConfigurationProperties 把一组相关配置绑定到类型安全对象。
words.code_snippet:
@ConfigurationProperties(prefix = "app.mail")
public record MailProperties(String host, int port) { }

words.example_sentence: A profile activates environment-specific beans and settings.
words.example_sentence_cn: Profile 用于启用特定环境的 Bean 和配置。

words.example_sentence: The @Profile annotation limits a bean to selected profiles.
words.example_sentence_cn: @Profile 注解限制 Bean 只在指定环境中启用。

words.example_sentence: The active profile determines which profile-specific configuration is loaded.
words.example_sentence_cn: 当前激活环境决定加载哪组环境专用配置。

words.example_sentence: The server.port property changes the embedded web server's listening port.
words.example_sentence_cn: server.port 属性修改内嵌 Web 服务器的监听端口。

words.example_sentence: Datasource configuration defines the database URL, credentials, driver, and pool.
words.example_sentence_cn: 数据源配置定义数据库地址、凭据、驱动和连接池。

words.example_sentence: spring-boot-starter-web provides Spring MVC, JSON support, and an embedded server.
words.example_sentence_cn: spring-boot-starter-web 提供 Spring MVC、JSON 支持和内嵌服务器。

words.example_sentence: spring-boot-starter-test provides common libraries for unit and integration tests.
words.example_sentence_cn: spring-boot-starter-test 提供常用单元测试和集成测试库。

words.pronunciation: /sprɪŋ buːt ˈstɑːrtər ˌdʒeɪ diː biː ˈsiː/
words.example_sentence: spring-boot-starter-jdbc configures JDBC support and a connection pool.
words.example_sentence_cn: spring-boot-starter-jdbc 配置 JDBC 支持和连接池。

words.pronunciation: /sprɪŋ buːt ˈstɑːrtər ˈdeɪtə ˌdʒeɪ piː ˈeɪ/
words.example_sentence: spring-boot-starter-data-jpa configures Spring Data JPA and Hibernate.
words.example_sentence_cn: spring-boot-starter-data-jpa 配置 Spring Data JPA 和 Hibernate。

words.example_sentence: Dependency management supplies compatible library versions without repeating them.
words.example_sentence_cn: 依赖版本管理提供兼容的类库版本，避免重复声明版本号。

words.example_sentence: The parent POM provides dependency and plugin defaults for a Maven project.
words.example_sentence_cn: 父 POM 为 Maven 项目提供依赖和插件默认配置。

words.example_sentence: The Spring Boot Maven Plugin packages and runs Spring Boot applications.
words.example_sentence_cn: Spring Boot Maven Plugin 用于打包和运行 Spring Boot 应用。

words.example_sentence: Spring Boot DevTools improves local development with automatic restart support.
words.example_sentence_cn: Spring Boot DevTools 通过自动重启等能力改善本地开发体验。

words.example_sentence: Actuator exposes operational endpoints for health, metrics, and application information.
words.example_sentence_cn: Actuator 提供健康、指标和应用信息等运维端点。

words.example_sentence: The health endpoint reports whether the application and its dependencies are available.
words.example_sentence_cn: 健康端点报告应用及其依赖是否可用。

words.example_sentence: The metrics endpoint exposes measurements collected by the application.
words.example_sentence_cn: 指标端点公开应用收集的运行测量数据。

words.example_sentence: The info endpoint exposes selected application metadata.
words.example_sentence_cn: 信息端点公开选定的应用元数据。

words.example_sentence: ResponseEntity represents an HTTP status, headers, and body.
words.example_sentence_cn: ResponseEntity 封装 HTTP 状态码、响应头和响应体。

words.example_sentence: The @ControllerAdvice annotation applies exception handling and binding logic across controllers.
words.example_sentence_cn: @ControllerAdvice 在多个控制器之间统一应用异常处理和绑定逻辑。

words.example_sentence: The @ExceptionHandler annotation maps an exception type to a handler method.
words.example_sentence_cn: @ExceptionHandler 注解把异常类型映射到处理方法。

words.example_sentence: The validation starter adds Jakarta Bean Validation support.
words.example_sentence_cn: 参数校验 Starter 添加 Jakarta Bean Validation 支持。

words.example_sentence: The @Valid annotation triggers validation of a request object.
words.example_sentence_cn: @Valid 注解触发对请求对象的校验。

words.example_sentence: BindingResult contains binding and validation errors for a model object.
words.example_sentence_cn: BindingResult 保存模型对象的数据绑定和校验错误。
words.code_snippet: String submit(@Valid UserForm form, BindingResult result) { }

words.example_sentence: Spring Data JPA generates repository implementations for JPA entities.
words.example_sentence_cn: Spring Data JPA 为 JPA 实体生成 Repository 实现。
words.code_snippet: interface UserRepository extends JpaRepository<User, Long> { }  // Spring Data JPA

words.example_sentence: An entity class maps an object type to a database table.
words.example_sentence_cn: 实体类把对象类型映射到数据库表。

words.example_sentence: A repository interface declares data-access operations without a manual implementation.
words.example_sentence_cn: Repository 接口无需手写实现即可声明数据访问操作。

words.example_sentence: CrudRepository provides basic create, read, update, and delete operations.
words.example_sentence_cn: CrudRepository 提供基本的增删改查操作。

words.example_sentence: JpaRepository adds JPA-specific persistence and paging operations.
words.example_sentence_cn: JpaRepository 增加 JPA 特定的持久化和分页操作。

words.example_sentence: HikariCP is the default JDBC connection pool in many Spring Boot setups.
words.example_sentence_cn: HikariCP 是许多 Spring Boot 配置中的默认 JDBC 连接池。

words.example_sentence: Flyway applies versioned database migration scripts in order.
words.example_sentence_cn: Flyway 按顺序执行带版本号的数据库迁移脚本。

words.example_sentence: Liquibase tracks database changes through structured changelogs.
words.example_sentence_cn: Liquibase 通过结构化变更日志跟踪数据库修改。

words.chinese: 完整应用上下文测试注解
words.example_sentence: The @SpringBootTest annotation loads the complete Spring Boot application context.
words.example_sentence_cn: @SpringBootTest 注解加载完整的 Spring Boot 应用上下文。

words.example_sentence: The @WebMvcTest annotation loads a focused Spring MVC test context.
words.example_sentence_cn: @WebMvcTest 注解加载聚焦于 Spring MVC 的测试上下文。

words.example_sentence: MockMvc tests Spring MVC requests without starting a real network server.
words.example_sentence_cn: MockMvc 无需启动真实网络服务器即可测试 Spring MVC 请求。

words.example_sentence: A test slice loads only the application layer needed by a focused test.
words.example_sentence_cn: 测试切片只加载当前测试所需的应用层。

words.example_sentence: A conditional bean is registered only when specified conditions match.
words.example_sentence_cn: 条件化 Bean 只在指定条件满足时注册。

words.chinese: 缺少Bean时生效的条件注解
words.example_sentence: The @ConditionalOnMissingBean annotation provides a default only when no matching bean exists.
words.example_sentence_cn: @ConditionalOnMissingBean 在不存在匹配 Bean 时提供默认实现。

words.example_sentence: Relaxed binding treats common property naming styles as equivalent.
words.example_sentence_cn: 宽松绑定会把常见的配置命名风格视为等价。
words.code_snippet: APP_MAIL_HOST maps to app.mail.host  // relaxed binding

words.example_sentence: The Spring Boot banner is printed when the application starts.
words.example_sentence_cn: Spring Boot 启动横幅会在应用启动时打印。
